title: Falcon's Wither Storm Adventure
description: Wrapper modpack for enhancing the Wither Storm experience.
body:
# 📖 Features: **Based around Create and Cracker's Wither Storm Mod with many QoL features like shaders and enhanced ambience.** Resource packs enhance animation realism.
Some performance mods for server and client included!
Additional server pack avaiable! Mods influencing gameplay:
Spoiler ## 🌐 Global Features: - [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod: ⚙️ Content](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) - [Create: ⚙️ Content](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - [Do a Barrel Roll: 🔧 Vanilla Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) - [EnhancedVisuals: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) - [Falcon's Wither Storm Adventure: Core: ⚙️ Content, 🔧 Mod Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/falcons-wither-storm-adventure-core) - [FerriteCore: 🚀 Performance](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - [Paxi: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) - [Simple Radio: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-radio) - [Simple Voice Chat: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) ## 🖥️ Client Features: - [AmbientSounds: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - [Cull Leaves: 🚀 Performance, ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) - [Embeddium: 🚀 Performance, ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) - [Entity Model Features: ✅ Resource Pack Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/3.0.11-fabric-1.21.11) - [Entity Texture Features: ✅ Ressource Pack Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - [ModernFix: 🚀 Performance](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - [Oculus: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) - [PresenceFootsteps: ✨ QoL](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps-forge) ## ⚙️ Server Features: - [ServerCore: 🚀 Performance](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) - Many YUNG's Better Structures Mods: 🔧 Vanilla Enhancement
Resource Packs:
Spoiler - [CWSM Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cwsm-enhanced-boss-bars) - [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars) - [VN4's Fresh Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vn4s-fresh-wither-storm) - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
